docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BRENT ANDERSON, DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS FILED BY DEFENDANT JEMICO, LLC JEMICO, LLC, DBA RENEWAL BY ANDERSEN OF SAN FRANCISCO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JEMICO, LLC JEMICO, LLC, DBA RENEWAL BY ANDERSEN OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM BARNICKEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEMICO LLC, REPRESENTED BY BENT ANDERSON, DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARNICKEL, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEMICO, LLC JEMICO, LLC, DBA RENEWAL BY ANDERSEN OF SAN FRANCISCO $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,155.00, COURT ESTIMATES TWO DEFECTIVE WINDOWS TO BE ABOUT $2,400.00 EACH. DELAY IN REPAIR AND FAILURE TO FOLLOW UP WITH PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,200.00 IS ALSO ADDED TO COST OF WINDOWS ($2,400.00 X 2 = $4,800.00) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $85.00 SERVED MAR-18-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JEMICO, LLC JEMICO, LLC, DBA RENEWAL BY ANDERSEN OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON APRIL 11, 2022)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BARNICKEL, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT JEMICO, LLC JEMICO, LLC, DBA RENEWAL BY ANDERSEN OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
